title: PVP-005: 500 Motion/Animation Defect Audit — Vision Tool Generated
method: vision_analyze on 8 game_loop screenshots from qa_runs/

defects.defect: Characters display mannequin-like stiffness with little natural compression at joints
Shoulders appear locked without visible deltoid or trapezius engagement
Elbows remain nearly straight in combat poses — no convincing flex for guard or strike
Spine shows no readable curvature — torsos are vertical columns
Hips do not rotate or tilt to support arm actions
Knees appear locked or barely bent, even in stepping poses
Ankles show no dorsiflexion/plantarflexion during weight transfer
Wrists remain straight — no cocking for strikes or flexing for grips
Neck is rigid with no head turn toward opponent or action point
Finger joints are absent — hands are rigid mitts
Characters resemble rig-test poses rather than trained fighters
Near-bind-pose arm extension persists across multiple screenshots
Elbows lack convincing bend even when reaching toward opponent (W2_neutral)
Shoulder elevation is uniform — no raising for guard, no dropping for power
Torso-coil is absent — no winding for strikes or bracing for impact
Rib-cage compression is absent — breathing or exertion not readable
Pelvic tilt is uniform — no anterior/posterior tilt for combat stance
Scapular movement is invisible — shoulder blades appear fused to ribcage
Clavicle depression/elevation not visible — arms move as rigid attachments
Character in W2_defense has arms that look mechanically positioned, not actively controlled
Yellow character in W2_neutral has stiff upper body with upright rigid torso
Purple character in W2_neutral has cramped leg configuration without readable hip engagement
Both characters in f020_range lack convincing weight distribution between legs
W2_clinch characters show rigid spine despite close contact
f111_ghosts yellow character has wide arms-out pose with no torso contribution
f112_hud characters show stiff arm extension with no joint cushioning
W2_yomi characters have mechanical-looking simultaneous arm spreads
Grab_closure_w2 character bodies remain upright and passive despite reported contact
Grab_closure_w1 characters show arms placed into position rather than driven by body mechanics
Lower body in all screenshots appears disconnected from upper-body actions
Legs do not visibly drive strikes — arm actions appear isolated
Feet positioning does not communicate a fighting base in any screenshot
No visible coiling of hips before arm extension
No visible weight settling into stance before action
Characters appear to float above ground rather than plant firmly
Torso rotation is minimal even in lateral-reaching poses
Shoulder-hip separation (X-factor) is absent in all frames
Characters lack anticipatory compression before contact
Characters lack follow-through extension after contact
No readable kinetic chain from feet through hips through torso to arms
Limbs appear driven by simple FK/IK targets without anatomical constraints
Joint limits appear unenforced — arms reach beyond natural ROM
No visible muscle deformation or skin sliding over skeleton
Poses lack dynamic asymmetry — characters appear mirrored or nearly symmetrical
No readable distinction between active and passive limbs
